subject: [PATCH v2 3/3] fuse: publish io-uring queues with release semantics

reviews.author: Bernd Schubert
reviews.summary: Recommended adding READ_ONCE/WRITE_ONCE in fuse_uring_destruct for consistency. Provided a Reviewed-by tag.

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new feature to publish io-uring queues with release semantics, ensuring that the queue is fully initialized before its pointer is accessed by readers. This fix addresses a double-put bug in fuse_try_move_page() where the folio refcount drops to zero prematurely.
